title: The UK, Norway and a group of countries on Thursday raised the alarm that RSF could imminently escalate assault on Al-Obeid.

snapshot.title: UK, Norway warn of atrocities, imminent RSF escalation in Sudan’s Al-Obeid
snapshot.description: GENEVA: The UK, ​Norway and a group of countries on Thursday raised the alarm at the UN Human ‌Rights Council that ‌the ​paramilitary ‌Rapid ⁠Support ​Forces in ⁠Sudan could imminently escalate their assault on the central Sudanese city of Al-Obeid, possibly ⁠resulting in ‌large-scale ‌atrocities.
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: UK, Norway warn of atrocities, imminent RSF escalation in Sudan’s Al-Obeid | Arab News
